Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS WESLEY TURNER AND WILLIAM TURNERS' Motion For Sanctions is DENIED. CCP 128.5 is inapplicable. Defendants failed to sustain burden under CCP 128.7(c)(1). Opposing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Peter Busch, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS WESLEY TURNER AND WILLIAM TURNERS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges cause of action for partition. Moving party and their attorney are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Opposing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Peter Busch, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
